segments.text: Their edgeguard defense was so solid
segments.original_text: 撃墜拒否が上手かったんで

segments.text: they were even landing throws at around 200%,
segments.original_text: 結構200%とかで投げを通しているシーンもあったんですけれども
ここはジャックから空中後ろを決めていきました

segments.text: This is the match they want to take
segments.original_text: この試合は物にしたいところなんですが

full_text: Their edgeguard defense was so solid they were even landing throws at around 200%, and here the bair connects! This is the match they want to take
